name: world-cup-agent-open
description: Algorithmic World Cup match prediction plugin with bring-your-own providers.

interface.shortDescription: Predict World Cup matches from independent research and odds providers.
interface.longDescription: Open-source World Cup prediction plugin with weighted prematch scoring, Bayesian calibration, independent Sportradar and The Odds API routing, optional crawler fallback, and a keyless offline demo.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the world-cup-prediction skill. Run world-cup-predict for the requested fixtures and report probabilities, risk, provider selection, coverage, and unsupported fields.
